name: Unguarded Await
description: Await expression not inside a try/catch. Promise rejection propagates uncaught to the caller.
smt2Template:
(declare-const promise_rejects Int)
(declare-const rejection_caught Int)
(assert (= promise_rejects 1))
(assert (= rejection_caught 0))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: HTTP client await without try/catch — network failure crashes the handler
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const request_fails Int)
(declare-const caught Int)
(assert (= request_fails 1))
(assert (= caught 0))
(check-sat)
